resources.string: Ghost is a minimalist keyboard with Unicode font styles. Transform your text into beautiful fonts like double-struck, cursive, fraktur, bubble text, and more!

Instructions:
1. Click "Enable Keyboard" to open settings
2. Enable "Ghost Keyboard"
3. Click "Select Keyboard" to choose it as your input method
4. Start typing in any app to use Ghost!

Normal: Hello World
Double-struck: ℍ𝕖𝕝𝕝𝕠 𝕎𝕠𝕣𝕝𝕕
Cursive: 𝓗𝓮𝓵𝓵𝓸 𝓦𝓸𝓻𝓵𝓭
Bubble: ⓗⓔⓛⓛⓞ ⓦⓞⓡⓛⓓ
Square: 🄷🄴🄻🄻🄾 🅆🄾🅁🄻🄳
